title: Junction (disambiguation)
content:
'''Junction''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Junction system (Mid Rim)|Junction system]]''', a [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]] [[Star system|system]]
*'''[[Junction system (Outer Rim Territories)|Junction system]]''', an [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]] system
**'''[[Feriae Junction]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Coronet Junction]]''', the [[transport]]ation service of [[Coronet City]].
*[[Feriae system]], or '''Junction system''', an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Star system/Legends|system]]
**'''[[Feriae Junction/Legends|Feriae Junction]]''', or '''Junction''', an Outer Rim trading world.
***'''[[Junction City]]'''
****'''[[Junction City cantina]]'''
*[[Feswe Corridor|'''Junction asteroid corridor''']], also known as the Feswe Corridor.
*'''[[Junction system (Mid Rim)/Legends|Junction system]]''', a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] system
**'''[[Junction V]]''', the homeworld of [[Lorian Nod]].
*'''[[Junk Junction]]''', a plaza on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]].
*The [[Junction (purification facility)|'''Junction''']], a purification facility on Taris.
*The [[Junction (speeder bike)|'''Junction''']], a model of [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]].

{{Disambig}}
